mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in housing starts signals a weakening supply environment that reduces new capacity and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in initial unemployment claims signals a weakening labor market that boosts risk-free rates and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weakening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the consumer price index signals a weakening inflation environment that reduces discount rates applied to equity cash flows and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening inflation periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real GDP signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in industrial production and a 1-month decline in housing starts signals a weakening supply environment that reduces new capacity and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in initial unemployment claims and a 1-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market that boosts risk-free rates and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weakening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 1-month decline in the consumer price index signals a weakening inflation environment that reduces discount rates applied to equity cash flows and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening inflation periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
